data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Usage tracking per equipment' as specified in the linked use case. However, the prior step evidence does not include any information or data regarding the tracking of usage per equipment, which is a critical component of the requirement. This absence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not support the existence or functionality of usage tracking.
gaps: No evidence of usage tracking per equipment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
